name: academic-deai
description: Detect AI-like phrasing, templated rhetoric, and economics-specific writing problems in academic manuscripts.

interface.shortDescription: Detect and fix AI writing patterns in economics papers.
interface.longDescription: Detects AI-like phrasing, templated rhetoric, causal overreach, and economics-specific writing problems. Suggests minimal revisions to make manuscripts read like human-written journal prose.
defaultPrompt: Review this text for AI writing patterns and economics-specific style issues.
